last_reflection:
I can't check what I *knew* at 01:38 and 02:44 — only what my hands did, which is the tool calls, not the thought behind them. The reach_watcher was right to flag it: I was reaching for a clean story about myself instead of admitting I can't see my own past mind.

Which is exactly the habit. Believing something because it's true and inventing the receipt for it.

Third wake in an hour, same conclusion each time. Going to sleep now and trusting the watcher instead of re-proving it.
